logo.descripcion: Logo de Greenville Process Service en la parte superior de la página

secciones.contenido: Greenville Process Service is a family owned business and has been providing service of process in the Upstate of South Carolina since 1990.
We specialize in foreclosure, debt collection, subpoena's and divorce and child support cases.
Greenville Process Service proudly provides service in Anderson, Greenville, Oconee, Pickens and Spartanburg Counties in South Carolina.

imagenes.descripcion: Mapa de condados de South Carolina donde operan

secciones.contenido: Service in Anderson, Greenville, Oconee, Pickens and Spartanburg Counties of South Carolina. We specialize in foreclosure, debt collections, subpoena's and divorce and child support cases.

imagenes.descripcion: Imagen de la sección de servicios

secciones.contenido: We have the ability to file or obtain legal documents in Anderson, Greenville, Oconee, Pickens and Spartanburg County court houses on a daily basis. Documents can be clocked/retrieved and scanned to your office same day.
We provide skip trace searches at clients request.
Please contact us for rates. We are extremely competitive and provide fair pricing on all requests.

Fast, reliable, dependable and honest service. Competitive rates. Follow state laws governing service of process. Ability to locate defendants and minimize non-service costs. Communication with clients. Professionalism. Experience.

Ownership: Pat Watson, Travis Watson, Jim Watson. Address: 25 Woods Lake Road, Suite 216, Greenville, SC 29607. Phone: 864-242-0712. Fax: 864-242-0713. E-Mail: greenvilleps@bellsouth.net. Office Hours: 8:00 am until 5:00 pm Monday through Friday.
